brief: Good morning, Alex. Quiet overnight — I cleared the desk so today is yours for the Nightjar mix. The Meridian Hall channel-map is confirmed (I sent the reply, your sign-off is one tap), Tidewater dailies are backed up to LTO and the cloud with proxies ready, and the Northlight multicam is synced except for two timecode gaps I flagged. Three things genuinely need you today; everything else is moving. The Meridian Festival window closes Friday — Tidewater is the only deadline I can't move for you.

overnight.text: Backed up 412 GB of Tidewater dailies to LTO + cloud, generated ProRes proxies
Drafted reply to the Meridian Hall curator confirming the quadraphonic channel map
Synced 6-camera Northlight concert footage by timecode — flagged 2 drift gaps for you
Cut a 30s vertical teaser for Nightjar, queued for your Instagram approval
Logged + tagged 1,240 stills from the Meridian Coffee scout, culled to 87 selects
Reconciled the Halcyon Studios invoice and chased the net-30 payment

pipeline.title: Nightjar
pipeline.note: 12-minute quadraphonic surround score, one cue per photograph. 9 of 12 cues locked; today's session mixes the rotating sound-stage that guides the visitor's eye.

pipeline.title: Tidewater
pipeline.note: Coastal-storm short shot on the drone from the cliffs. Meridian Festival submission closes Friday — needs your pick between two opening sequences.

pipeline.title: Solstice
pipeline.note: Final grade back from Chroma Post. One sign-off away from delivery — your approval on the hero frame is the last gate.

pipeline.title: Northlight
pipeline.note: The live concert — pipe organ, modular synths, string quintet, marimba, vocals. 6-cam multicam now synced; assembling the marimba movement.

pipeline.title: Meridian — Origins
pipeline.note: North-coast scout done, 87 selects ready for the director's deck. Call sheet drafts out to crew.

pipeline.title: Lumen
pipeline.note: Treatment in progress. Pre-pro call Saturday; I've assembled a reference board from your ambient / post-rock mood notes.

inbox.subject: Re: Quadraphonic channel map — confirmed
inbox.action: Reply drafted — sign off to send

inbox.subject: Following up on the studio-monitor feature
inbox.action: Draft ready — 2 quotes pulled from your notes

curious.title: How Maestro scored your week
curious.blurb: 16 hours of admin handled, 3 deadlines protected, 1 teaser cut. Here's the breakdown.

curious.title: Nightjar — channel-map preview
curious.blurb: The rotating quad sound-stage, visualized cue by cue against each photograph.
